---
format:
  pdf:
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    mainfont: "Times New Roman"
    fontsize: 11pt
    geometry:
      - margin=2.54cm
    bibliography: "../../../bibliography/references.bib"
    csl: "apa.csl"
    header-includes:
      - \usepackage{setspace}
      - \setstretch{1.0}
      - \usepackage{indentfirst}
      - \setlength{\parindent}{1.27cm}
      - \usepackage{booktabs}
      - \usepackage{tabularx}
      - \usepackage{float}
      - \usepackage{array}
      - \usepackage{caption}
      - \captionsetup[table]{format=plain, labelsep=newline, justification=raggedright, singlelinecheck=false, labelfont=bf}
crossref:
  tbl-title: Tabla
---

\begin{center}
\textbf{UNIVERSIDAD NACIONAL DE LOJA} \\
Carrera de Economía \\
Desarrollo Económico \\
Séptimo A \\
Unidad 1 \\
Septiembre 2025/Febrero 2026
\end{center}

\noindent \textbf{Nombre:} Erick Fabricio Condoy Seraquive \hfill \textbf{Fecha:} 05 de mayo de 2026

{{< include chapters/01-matriz.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/02-modernizacion.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/03-estructuralismo.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/04-neomarxismo.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/05-neoliberalismo.qmd >}}

# Referencias
::: {#refs}
:::
